values.claude: lightweight polyester mesh or athletic jersey fabric

A black button-up baseball jersey from the SkyyRose Black Rose Collection featuring 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' in white arched collegiate lettering across the chest, with white contrast piping along the placket, collar, and sleeve cuffs, and a branded collection patch on the lower front.
values.gemini: A black short-sleeved baseball jersey with white piping and buttons. The phrase 'BLACK IS BEAUTIFUL' is written across the chest in an arched, white, block-letter font.

gemini: Woven rectangular patch on the front bottom right with a tan background, featuring a rose logo inside a baseball diamond and text.
